languages.text: {n}Меровцы сполна насладились войной своих врагов, делая ставки на одну из двух сторон. Впрочем, ксеносов-победителей ждала одна и та же судьба каждый раз — внезапное нападение сразу после того, как последний противник исчезал в зеленой вспышке телепортации. И только что радовавшийся выигрышу меровец обрушивал огонь на того, на кого ставил еще десять минут назад.{/n}

{n}The Merovians revelled in their enemies' war, placing bets on either side. The xenos victors, however, met the same fate after each skirmish: a surprise attack as soon as the last enemy had disappeared in a green flash of teleportation. And the Merovian who had just been celebrating his windfall would rain fire down on the creature he had bet on not ten minutes before.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Меровцы сполна насладились войной своих врагов, делая ставки на одну из двух сторон. languages.text: {n}メロヴィアンは敵の戦争を楽しみ、両陣営に賭けをした。しかし、異種族の勝利者たちは、小競り合いごとに同じ運命を辿った。最後の敵が緑色の光で消えた直後、彼らは突然襲撃されたのだ。そして、その直前に大金を得て喜んでいたメロヴィアンは、数分前に賭けた異種族に火炎を浴びせた。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians revelled in their enemies' war, placing bets on either side. The xenos victors, however, met the same fate after each skirmish: a surprise attack as soon as the last enemy had disappeared in a green flash of teleportation. And the Merovian who had just been celebrating his windfall would rain fire down on the creature he had bet on not ten minutes before.{/n}

traits.locale_text: メロヴィアンは敵の戦争を楽しみ、両陣営に賭けをした。しかし、異種族の勝利者たちは、小競り合いごとに同じ運命を辿った。最後の敵が緑色の光で消えた直後、彼らは突然襲撃されたのだ。そして、その直前に大金を得て喜んでいたメロヴィアンは、数分前に賭けた異種族に火炎を浴びせた。

languages.text: {n}Los merovianos se regocijaron con la guerra de sus enemigos, apostando por uno u otro bando. Sin embargo, los xenos vencedores sufrieron el mismo destino tras cada escaramuza: un ataque sorpresa en cuanto el último enemigo se esfumaba en un fogonazo verde de teletransporte. Mientras, los merovianos que habían celebrado sus ganancias hacían llover destrucción sobre las criaturas por las que habían apostado minutos atrás.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians revelled in their enemies' war, placing bets on either side. The xenos victors, however, met the same fate after each skirmish: a surprise attack as soon as the last enemy had disappeared in a green flash of teleportation. And the Merovian who had just been celebrating his windfall would rain fire down on the creature he had bet on not ten minutes before.{/n}

languages.text: {n}梅罗夫人兴致勃勃地观赏着仇敌间的相互厮杀，甚至为双方设下赌注。然而，每场冲突中的异形胜者都迎来了同样的结局：最后一名敌人刚在绿色传送闪光中消失，突袭就骤然而至。刚刚还在庆祝发了横财的梅罗夫士兵，转头就把火力倾泻在他十分钟前押注的怪物上。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians revelled in their enemies' war, placing bets on either side. The xenos victors, however, met the same fate after each skirmish: a surprise attack as soon as the last enemy had disappeared in a green flash of teleportation. And the Merovian who had just been celebrating his windfall would rain fire down on the creature he had bet on not ten minutes before.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Merovianer weideten sich am Krieg ihrer Feinde und gaben Wetten auf beide Seiten ab. Die siegreichen Xenos erwartet aber nach jedem Gefecht dasselbe Schicksal – ein Überraschungsangriff, sobald der letzte Gegner in einem grünen Teleportationsblitz verschwunden ist. Und der Merovianer, der gerade noch seinen Geldsegen gefeiert hatte, ließ Feuer auf die Kreatur herabregnen, auf die er keine zehn Minuten zuvor gesetzt hatte.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians revelled in their enemies' war, placing bets on either side. The xenos victors, however, met the same fate after each skirmish: a surprise attack as soon as the last enemy had disappeared in a green flash of teleportation. And the Merovian who had just been celebrating his windfall would rain fire down on the creature he had bet on not ten minutes before.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Düşmanlarının savaşmasından zevk duyan Merovlular, her iki tarafa da bahisler oynadı. Ancak kazanan zenolar, her çatışmadan sonra aynı sonla karşılaştı: Son düşman yeşil bir ışınlanma parıltısında kaybolur kaybolmaz yapılan bir sürpriz saldırı. Az önce kazancını kutlayan Merovlu, on dakika önce üzerine bahis oynadığı yaratığa ateş yağdırdı.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians revelled in their enemies' war, placing bets on either side. The xenos victors, however, met the same fate after each skirmish: a surprise attack as soon as the last enemy had disappeared in a green flash of teleportation. And the Merovian who had just been celebrating his windfall would rain fire down on the creature he had bet on not ten minutes before.{/n}

Ancak kazanan zenolar, her çatışmadan sonra aynı sonla karşılaştı: Son düşman yeşil bir ışınlanma parıltısında kaybolur kaybolmaz yapılan bir sürpriz saldırı. Az önce kazancını kutlayan Merovlu, on dakika önce üzerine bahis oynadığı yaratığa ateş yağdırdı.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les Meroviens se délectèrent de la guerre opposant leurs ennemis, misant sur l'un ou l'autre camp. Les xénos vainqueurs, cependant, connurent le même sort après chaque escarmouche : dès l'instant où le dernier vaincu se volatilisait dans un éclair de lumière verte, un assaut-surprise était lancé. Et les Meroviens, qui venaient de fêter leurs gains, faisaient s'abattre une pluie de feu sur les créatures qu'ils espéraient voir gagner quelques instants auparavant.{/n}
